answer: SPICE uses a standard error handling mechanism: routines check for errors using `IF (RETURN()) THEN`, signal errors with `CALL SIGERR`, and provide error messages using `CALL SETMSG` and related routines like `CALL ERRINT` and `CALL ERRCH` [ZZEKILLE:6-8, RDCMD:56-60, ZZEKILLE:29-32, GETQAV:349-351]. Error handling includes checking in and out of routines with `CALL CHKIN` and `CALL CHKOUT` [TRGSEP:9-11, TRGSEP:48-50]. Some routines save and restore error handling modes [GETSTA:16-21, GETQAV:16-21].
